channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Memorial Day 2026 Grill and Griddle Deals: Weber, Traeger, Recteq
item.description: Some of WIRED's favorite griddles, grills, and pellet smokers are as much as $250 off for Memorial Day weekend.

item.title: Meta’s Forum is part Reddit, part Facebook, and part Google AI Overview
item.description: Meta's new Forum app for iPhones takes Facebook Groups and moves them to a dedicated app with a dedicated AI chatbot to go with it, like an AI revamp of the ill-fated Groups app Facebook shut down in 2017. Rather than going to ChatGPT or tacking "Reddit" onto the end of a Google search, Forum […]

item.title: A founding member of OpenAI has joined Anthropic to boost Claude's research capabilities
item.description: OpenAI co-founder Andrej Karpathy is now part of Anthropic's AI team and will helm a team that handles pre-training research.

item.title: Elon, stop trying to make Grok happen
item.description: There is a harsh truth about Elon Musk's "truth-seeking" AI chatbot Grok: It's not very good, and not many people are using it. That's the takeaway of a new Reuters report, which found that Grok barely appears in federal records of how the US government used AI last year. It's not the only sign xAI's […]

item.title: Microsoft confirms two major Defender security issues — so update now or face possible attack
item.description: CISA confirms two bugs being actively exploited in the wild, as Microsoft releases patches.

item.title: Macron annonce 1 milliard d’euros pour l’informatique quantique et appelle l’Europe à un « Quantum Act » face aux États-Unis
item.description: En 24 heures, Washington et Paris ont mis 3 milliards sur la table pour le calcul quantique. Le message est le même des deux côtés de l'Atlantique : cette technologie ne sera pas un sujet de recherche, mais une industrie stratégique.

item.title: The best Memorial Day sales you can shop this weekend
item.description: Memorial Day is nearly here, meaning the seasonal sales are in full swing. If your weekend plans involve pool parties or barbecues, now is a great time to pick up a portable speaker or set of solar lights, as many of our favorite models are currently on sale. You can also find deals on everything […]

item.title: Apple iOS 27 could leave iPhone 11 users behind
item.description: Apple's next big iOS upgrade could phase out your old iPhone 11.

item.title: Xiaomi 15T, MSI RTX 5070 et DJI Romo P : trois offres incontournables pour ce vendredi 22 mai 2026 – meilleurs bons plans
item.description: En ce vendredi 22 mai 2026, les bons plans high-tech du jour sont particulièrement généreux.

item.title: How to watch F1 live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch F1 for free. Live stream the 2026 F1 season for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Here are the biggest announcements from Warhammer Skulls 2026, including how to claim a free 40,000 Steam game
item.description: The biggest announcements from Warhammer Skulls 2026.

item.title: Govee’s colorful, JBL-tuned Lamp Pro 2 is matching its best price to date
item.description: They say that Memorial Day marks the unofficial start of summer. I have my doubts given the less-than-balmy weather in many parts of the US this weekend, though that doesn’t mean it’s not an appropriate time to pick up some summer essentials — including a portable speaker / smart lamp like Govee’s Table Lamp 2 […]

item.title: "Google Search is now AI Search" equals the worst thing to happen to the internet since social media, except this time we can all see it coming
item.description: At this year's Google I/O, one of the biggest changes presented by the Silicon Valley giant was to Search. Here's why you should care about what comes next.

item.title: Google appeals search monopoly ruling, says it won business ‘fair and square’
item.description: Google officially filed its appeal of the federal ruling deeming it an illegal search monopolist, arguing the decision "crashed" through legal guardrails. "Google just prevailed in the marketplace fair and square," it writes in its legal filing. Google had already said it would appeal the ruling, which includes both the August 2024 decision about its […]...

item.title: Kash Patel’s clothing brand website shut down after reports it was hacked
item.description: According to users on X, the website was hijacked by hackers in an attempt to trick visitors into installing malware.

item.title: Apple says Epic lawsuit shouldn’t reshape App Store rules for all developers
item.description: Apple is asking the Supreme Court to narrow the App Store injunction won by Epic Games and overturn the court’s contempt ruling over external payment fees.

item.title: Trump Mobile has exposed customers' personal data, including home addresses and phone numbers
item.description: Trump Mobile admitted to the leak after people started finding that their information was publicly accessible.

item.title: Walmart's Memorial Day sale is filled with summer essentials — 60% off grills, patio furniture, pool speakers, lawn mowers, and more
item.description: Walmart's Memorial Day sale is live, with deals on summer essentials, and I have all the top deals on patio furniture, grills, lawn mowers, speakers, and more.

item.title: Watch: CNETs Patrick Holland tests the Trump Phone and answers your questions live
item.description: CNET’s Patrick Holland tests Trump Mobile’s flagship phone and answers audience questions during a live Q&A session.

item.title: Spotify’s AI bet: more of everything, less of what you want
item.description: Spotify has released a bunch of AI-powered tools that nudge users to create more content. It can be a bit much.

item.title: Waymo suspends freeway driving amid safety concerns
item.description: On Thursday, Waymo customers opened up the app and noticed something unusual: no more freeway service. Trips that would normally take a few minutes on the freeway were suddenly projected to last much longer via local roads. The company later confirmed that it had suspended freeway driving across all of its US markets over concerns […]

item.title: You can no longer Google the word ‘disregard’
item.description: After Google Search's AI update, the word "disregard" now effectively breaks the search interface.

item.title: Mozilla VPN's shortcut lands on iPhone, with macOS and Linux users also getting a boost — here's all you need to know
item.description: Mozilla VPN’s latest updates introduce a handy iOS Control Center toggle for iPhone, alongside major performance and stability upgrades for macOS and Linux clients.

item.title: Jusqu’à 13 900 € de baisse : Polestar casse les prix de ses SUV électriques futuristes
item.description: Polestar retouche les Polestar 3 et Polestar 4. Ces deux modèles grattent des améliorations appréciables comme une plateforme 800 V boostant les temps de recharge. Leurs prix sont en forte baisse, les rendant compétitifs.

item.title: Google’s AI search is so broken it can ‘disregard’ what you’re looking for
item.description: Google's AI Overviews are running into an interesting problem right now. As of this writing, if you search for the term "disregard," instead of showing the usual AI-generated summary of search results, the AI Overview section instead includes a response like what you'd see from a more traditional AI chatbot, as called out by a […]

item.title: How to watch Montpellier vs Ulster: Free Streams & TV Channels for 2025/26 EPCR Challenge Cup final
item.description: All the ways to watch Montpellier vs Ulster live streams online – including for FREE – as Bilbao's San Mamés stadium hosts the 2025/26 EPCR Challenge Cup final.

item.title: Exclusive: Funko’s latest Star Wars figures bring The Mandalorian and Grogu to your desk
item.description: As 'The Mandalorian and Grogu' lands in theaters, TechRadar can exclusively reveal Funko’s new POP! figures and Mystery Minis inspired by the film, including Grogu, Rotta the Hutt, Embo, and more.

item.title: La Boîte Sosh VS RED Box : quelle est la meilleure box internet low-cost pour faire des économies sans perdre en débits ?
item.description: Nés peu après l'incursion de Free sur le marché des télécoms, Sosh et RED by SFR sont les opérateurs low-cost les plus populaires du marché. Ils sont notamment parvenus à se démarquer rapidement avec leurs forfaits pas chers et sans engagement, autant sur le fixe que sur le mobile.
